items.title: Brazil's Bolsonaro gets temporary house arrest for ill-health
items.dek: Former President Jair Bolsonaro was moved from his cell to hospital earlier this month with pneumonia.
items.body: Former President Jair Bolsonaro was moved from his cell to hospital earlier this month with pneumonia.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ghana demands compensation for slavery in landmark UN vote
items.dek: Nations will vote on whether to designate the slave trade as "the gravest crime against humanity".
items.body: Nations will vote on whether to designate the slave trade as "the gravest crime against humanity".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'Fearless' Mel Schilling remembered by Married at First Sight co-star
items.dek: Paul C Brunson pays an emotional tribute to his fellow TV relationship expert, who died on Tuesday.
items.body: Paul C Brunson pays an emotional tribute to his fellow TV relationship expert, who died on Tuesday.
